prompt: A cinematic, side-profile wide shot of educational materials falling like dominoes from left to right, dominating the foreground and taking up most of the frame. On the far left, a single sheet of paper with a red "D" grade is tipping over. It knocks into a thin, worn spiral notebook, which triggers a chain reaction, knocking into progressively thicker, heavier academic textbooks. The books get massive and are caught mid-fall in a heavy, oppressive sequence. The camera is directly facing the side of the book lineup. In the deep, out-of-focus background, the silhouette of a ceiling fan with a frayed rope hanging from it is faintly visible. The atmosphere is devoid of any humans. Very dark, gloomy, suffocating lighting, deep shadows, monochromatic tones with high contrast. Photorealistic, chilling, highly detailed.
dataset_name: Accidental Deaths and Suicides in India 2023
insight: The rate of suicides among students in India has doubled in the last 2 decades, highlighting a growing mental health crisis in the country.
